horoscope: Listening to or helping out someone special can be satisfying today, dear Aries. It’s a time of the lunar month for gathering up more strength through your connections. At the same time, you stand to gain valuable insight, or perhaps some inspiration, from your communications or personal musings. Still, today's energies make it a little difficult to relax, but not impossible! Aim to keep things moderate and remain flexible to allow for errors so that you can make the most of this time. Do your best to avoid nervous tension, which will distract you from making fair and meaningful assessments, particularly with money and business matters which can be iffy today.

It’s an enjoyable time for learning and guiding, dear Taurus. Your openness in your communications attracts opportunities. It’s a fine time for positive reinforcement, kind gestures, good news, and compliments. Uranus will leave your sign in a few weeks, but it heads toward a minor challenging aspect with the Sun today, and you'll want to resist the urge to rebel or snap at others if you feel that your plans are not coming together well. On the other hand, if you need to quickly put a problem behind you, it can be a good time to do so.

You’re in a creating and sharing mood with the Moon in your sector of joy all day, dear Gemini. Fortunately, communications or incoming news can be positive, aiding decision-making and boosting your mood. Transits now might help to clarify a recent misunderstanding. You’re in great shape to find yourself on the same page with someone close to you. Consider that holding onto problems and secrets can negatively affect your health and well-being, and with Uranus entering your sign later this month, you'll learn to bring some of these things into the light. Today, it's probably also best not to follow whims.

The day favors family and home matters, dear Cancer. You tend to stick with familiar and emotionally safe circumstances as the Moon transits your solar fourth house all day. This is about feeling out and enjoying your comfort zone–a useful process at this time of the lunar month. Rebuilding some emotional strength makes sense right now. However, friendships can bring in support and enjoyment. You are in a friendly mood, and current energies support compromises, negotiations, and breathing new life into your connections. Conversations can be very fruitful and even inspiring. But while you’re likely to have some wonderful ideas now, you may be experiencing some impulsiveness or impatience in spots today. It may be best to avoid acting on ego or emotion, which can lead to rash decisions. Even so, it's useful to recognize your need to make changes — it's just better to think before you act.

You want to understand your connections and tune into your own desires and ambitions today, dear Leo. Fortunately, cooperation comes easily today, and conversations can be heartwarming and helpful. A recent promising situation that was in the air has now worked out. Still, discontent is possible, and there can be tense energies when it comes to business, career, or reputation matters. Solutions may not be apparent right now, but you'll benefit from looking at things from a different perspective.

Finding mutual interests may be an excellent way to smooth relationships over today, dear Virgo. Fortunately, the ability to put things into perspective opens up doors for you. Positive feedback is likely, and it can boost your general outlook. Still, life can feel just a tad unpredictable today, or there can be tensions with someone, particularly related to opinions and beliefs. There is a tendency to want more without knowing what that "more" is, or to look outside of yourself for happiness. A little self-honesty can go a long way today.

Your conversations and interactions can be particularly forward-looking today, dear Libra, inspiring much optimism. You approach your practical affairs with positivity, and there can be good news about your work or reputation. A previous problem along these lines can be resolved. While restlessness is possible, it's also a time for exciting new ideas and visions. You don't want barriers and boundaries to limit you in your relationships, but not everyone is likely to understand your needs. Accept surprises rather than let them discourage you because, in the process, you may very well learn something valuable.

Today’s energies are mostly smooth on a mental level, dear Scorpio. A lingering problem can find a resolution now, and it’s satisfying as Mercury is getting ready to return to its harmony with Jupiter. The Moon inclines you to take things easy, as an instinctive desire for a detour from the usuals is with you. However, the day also holds some tendency to restlessness or surprises. You can experience boredom with ordinary or routine matters, yet still feel a desire to take care of them. You'll need to get creative to fill your need for excitement as you handle mundane affairs. Take the initiative to change the scene, for example.

Directing your brain to the more positive and supportive information around you today comes naturally, dear Sagittarius. Reaching out can boost a family or intimate relationship. You tend to keep yourself busy today, and you’re particularly alert and curious. You’re drawn to–and you draw in–lively circumstances and people. Still, it can be hard to get things done step by step. Changes made now should only be small ones -- simple adjustments that allow you room to breathe -- rather than abrupt ones. This can be a fruitful and creative day for teamwork, friendships, and networking, although if overdone, productivity in other areas can suffer.

Fortunately, good news or reviews may come in today, dear Capricorn, boosting your spirits. Creativity runs high, and you can feel particularly powerful as you develop a special project. You might gain an advantage in your current pursuits. Your interactions are especially positive, and it’s easy to arrive at agreements. However, you might have a taste for something more than the ordinary. An inner need for change may be difficult to recognize if you're running on autopilot, but it can still upset the status quo or attract unusual circumstances and interruptions into your life. Be wary of giving off mixed signals and aim for self-understanding. Recognize your need for a change of pace for the best results now. Patience can be hard to muster up but will serve you very well.

A problem might unblock as new information flows in today and early tomorrow, dear Aquarius. You’re looking ahead, and connecting with your innate optimism feels good. You believe in yourself and your endeavors! Today’s transits are good for your family and home life, particularly how your personal life empowers you. However, restlessness is possible, and there is little need to get too worked up about frustrating issues that arise now, as they have very little staying power. Try to change up your routines in small ways so that you satisfy a need for something new and different.

You might look for opportunities to collaborate with someone or partner up on a special project today, dear Pisces. Fortunately, it’s natural to rise above problems and make the best of circumstances today. You have reason to feel optimistic again about a plan. Still, you may feel an urge for change, but it's hard to know exactly what. Influences now encourage you to experiment with different approaches and ideas, but tying yourself down to any of these may not be wise until you're more decided. Negotiations are unlikely to be fruitful temporarily, as both parties may be more concerned with their freedom than with coming together. There can also be a tendency to soothe feelings of discontent with material things.
